comparators.description: Element-wise max|pred-ref| <= tolerance. Asserts every pls4all binding produces bit-identical outputs to the C kernel.
comparators.name: binding-consistency gate

comparators.description: Relative-RMSE ||pred-ref||_RMS / ||ref||_RMS <= tolerance, with an absolute-RMSE <= 1e-9 escape near zero. Asserts pls4all's algorithm output matches an external ground-truth implementation within the method's declared tolerance band.
comparators.name: external-reference validity gate
